meaning: vt.移动,开除,移交vi.迁移,搬家n.移动,距离,班级,升级
examples: Scuff marks from shoes are difficult to remove.
The logical treatment is to remove this blockage.
Once the turkey has defrosted, remove the giblets.
Instead of having to remove and insert the ammo cartridge, giving it a firm jab suffices.
For our economy to thrive once again, we must remove these barriers to job creation.
